worldData.instructions:
ASCENT — a one-thumb climb.

A light rises on its own up a narrow channel. DRAG left and right to weave it past the drifting rings. Touch and hold to steer; let go and it holds its line.

The higher you climb the faster it goes. Your score is height. Tap to rise, tap to retry.

stepHooks.author: fable
stepHooks.description: ASCENT: a rising light you drag past drifting hazards; height is score

visualTypes.name: ascent
